---
title: Implementing mTLS
author: ZeroTrustBlog
date: 2024-02-24
description: Mutual TLS ensures both client and server authenticate each other
tags: ["#mtls", "#zerotrust"]
---
Mutual TLS ensures both client and server authenticate each other. In a zero-trust architecture, every connection is verified — no implicit trust.

This is especially important in service mesh architectures where microservices communicate across network boundaries.
